title: How to Install Approved Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How do I install approved software from the software catalog?
A: Windows: Step 1: Open the Start menu and search for 'Software Center'. Step 2: Click on 'Software Center' to launch the application. Step 3: In the Software Center, navigate to the 'Applications' tab to view the list of approved software. Step 4: Find the software you wish to install and click on it. Step 5: Click the 'Install' button to begin the installation process. Step 6: Follow any on-screen prompts to complete the installation. macOS: Step 1: Open 'Self Service' from your Applications folder or via Spotlight search. Step 2: Once Self Service is open, browse through the available applications or use the search bar to find the software you need. Step 3: Click on the desired application to view more details. Step 4: Press the 'Install' button to start the installation. Step 5: Wait for the installation to complete, and you will receive a notification once it is done. Step 6: If prompted, enter your company credentials to authorize the installation. Ensure you have a stable internet connection during the process for a smooth installation.
